field_descriptions.id: Stable lowercase identifier for this pitfall. Use kebab-case and keep it unique.
field_descriptions.title: Short human-readable title shown in reviews or structured warnings.
field_descriptions.category: Primary domain: micropython, driver, scheduler, lint, deploy, user-feedback, or another narrow category.
field_descriptions.applies_to: Scope selectors. Use modes for full/fix, scheduler_modes for timer/async/thread, device_types for hardware classes, and files for glob-like affected paths.
field_descriptions.symptoms: Observable failures, logs, exceptions, or user feedback that suggest this pitfall.
field_descriptions.wrong_pattern: Concise description or code shape that should be avoided.
field_descriptions.detection: How to detect the issue. script is a bundled checker, grep is a lightweight search hint, structured_error_code is the stable protocol code.
field_descriptions.fix_guidance: Ordered repair hints to apply in full or fix mode.
field_descriptions.references: Docs, reference files, or source paths that justify the rule.
field_descriptions.verified_by: Scripts, tests, or checklist items that verify the fix.
field_descriptions.confidence: high, medium, or low depending on how deterministic the rule is.
field_descriptions.last_seen: Date when this pitfall was added or last confirmed.

title: Short pitfall title
category: micropython | driver | scheduler | lint | deploy | user-feedback
